name: Hot Chocolate Toddy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the milk and cream before adding other ingredients.
2. Combine 4 tablespoons of Dutch Processed Cocoa, 2 tablespoons of Sugar, 2 cups of Milk, and 1/4 cup of Heavy Cream (or 3/4 cup Half and Half).
3. Stir in 1 teaspoon of Vanilla Extract, 2 teaspoons of Dark Rum, 1 teaspoon of Cognac, a dash of cinnamon, and a dash of nutmeg.
4. Heat the mixture until it is hot but not boiling.
